key_facts: Kestrel Marine builds autonomous survey vessels at its shipyard in Aberdeen.
Kestrel Marine was founded in 2009 by two former offshore engineers.
Kestrel Marine's board appointed Ingrid Solheim as chief executive in November 2025.
Kestrel Marine's largest contract to date was signed in 2024 with the Norwegian Coastal Administration and covers seabed mapping of 14,000 square kilometres.
Kestrel Marine operates a training academy in Stavanger.
Kestrel Marine's training academy in Stavanger certified 120 pilots in 2025.
